responsibility: Declare module path and Go version
guideline: Keep module metadata only

responsibility: Stable error IDs and error payload types
guideline: Small file focused on error constants and structs

responsibility: Command schema and compiled command types
guideline: Keep transport structs separate from parser implementation

responsibility: Top-level Parse and Validate entry points
guideline: Expose a narrow runtime API for users

responsibility: Registry interfaces and admin extension hooks
guideline: Expose extension points without leaking compiler internals

responsibility: Trusted admin command builder helpers
guideline: Keep builder convenience separate from runtime validation

responsibility: Schema command AST types
guideline: Do not expose parsed token internals as public API

responsibility: Parse admin schema token arrays into AST
guideline: Only tokenize and shape-check schema commands

responsibility: Compile schema AST into immutable validator specs
guideline: Own schema flag validation and registry lookup

responsibility: Compile tuple size and tuple slot schemas
guideline: Keep tuple index rules isolated and testable

responsibility: Parse user argv against compiled command schemas
guideline: Must never compile schemas or register operators

responsibility: Represent typed runtime flag values
guideline: Keep argv parsing data structures small

responsibility: String validator implementations
guideline: Group only closely related string rules

responsibility: Number validator implementations
guideline: Keep numeric parsing separate from string validation

responsibility: Tuple validator implementation
guideline: Validate tuple length and slot validators only

responsibility: List and repeatable validator implementation
guideline: Keep repeatable collection rules separate from tuple rules

responsibility: URL validator using net/url
guideline: Keep URL-specific parsing and flags out of generic string code

responsibility: AWS ARN validator using aws-sdk-go-v2 aws/arn
guideline: Keep optional AWS dependency isolated if possible

responsibility: Date datetime time and duration validators
guideline: Keep time layout parsing in one focused file

responsibility: Email validator using net/mail
guideline: Keep email-specific domain allow-list logic local

responsibility: Hex color validator
guideline: Keep minimal color support independent from CSS parsing

responsibility: Shared assertions for validation errors
guideline: Keep test helpers out of production API
